name.description: Stable identifier for this definition repo (matches deployment definitions[].name).

default_schema.description: Default Postgres schema for materialized tables; deployments may override via definitions[].schema.

owners.description: Maintainer / contact / governance metadata for humans and docs, not authentication, Postgres roles, or deployment ACLs.

framework_version.description: Declared compatible opendata-etl / schema contract range (semver range text).

dependencies.description: Other definition repo names this repo expects at authoring time (CI/docs); runtime ordering uses deployment depends_on.

derived_python.description: When true, this repo may ship derived_jobs/*.yml and python/derived/ entrypoints.

derived_image.description: Optional ECR/OCI image for derived job workers (scaled profile); defaults to deployment framework image.

sql_extensions.description: When true, this repo ships API-facing Postgres functions under sql/functions/*.sql (applied at provision/materialize).
